case_title: HOUSE OF BRANHAM INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & et al VS SORIANO, ELVIRA C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,262.95 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, ELVIRA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORIANO, ELVIRA C. $1,237.95 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,285.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PAYMNTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $30 EVERY 2 WEEKS BEGINNING 3/6/96 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMNT IS MISSED,ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, ELVIRA C.
